title: exostema spinosum subsp. tortuense
intro: Exostema spinosum subsp. tortuense, also known as the twisted exostema, is a tropical plant species within the Rubiaceae family. It is traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Exostema spinosum subsp. tortuense include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in various forms, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to support immune function and overall well-being.
